title: Squish – The fastest way to run local LLMs on Apple Silicon
abstract: Tired of struggling to run large language models locally? Squish is here to save the day! Specifically designed for Macs, this lightweight wonder gives your Apple Silicon a turbo boost. With Squish, running local LLMs becomes as easy as pie—literally. The setup is so straightforward, it might make you question if you're doing something wrong. Just open and start enjoying the speed and convenience.
abstract_zh: 你还在为跑不动的大型语言模型发愁吗？Squish来啦！这可是专为Mac设计的小巧神器，装上它，就像给你的苹果芯加了个超级加速器。用上Squish，本地运行LSTM模型so easy，仿佛给你带来了无限可能！而且操作简单到让你怀疑人生，打开就是会用的那种。
